# CWE-1322 negative: non-blocking worker with timer channel (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-1322-safe.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

// CWE-1322 mitigated: worker schedules retries with time.AfterFunc instead of Sleep.

import (
	"database/sql"
	"net/http"
	"time"
)

type webhookJobPure struct {
	payload string
	attempt int
}

func StartWebhookWorkerSafePure(db *sql.DB) http.HandlerFunc {
	queue := make(chan webhookJobPure, 32)
	go func() {
		for job := range queue {
			if _, err := db.Exec(
				"INSERT INTO webhook_events (payload) VALUES ($1)", job.payload,
			); err != nil && job.attempt < 3 {
				delay := time.Duration(job.attempt+1) * time.Second
				time.AfterFunc(delay, func() {
					queue <- webhookJobPure{payload: job.payload, attempt: job.attempt + 1}
				})
			}
		}
	}()
	return func(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
		if err := r.ParseForm(); err != nil {
			http.Error(w, err.Error(), http.StatusBadRequest)
			return
		}
		queue <- webhookJobPure{payload: r.FormValue("payload")}
		w.Header().Set("Content-Type", "application/json")
		w.Write([]byte(`{"queued":true}`))
	}
}
